---
title: "Upload, Review & Approval"
author: "World Bank / UNHCR Joint Team"
date: today
---

## Overview

Harmonized data files are uploaded back through PRIMUS for review. A reviewer
checks the file against the [schema](05-schema.qmd) — mandatory variables present,
correct types/labels, valid value ranges — before approving it.

## The approval workflow

PRIMUS separates two roles with distinct actions:

1. **Uploader → `CONFIRM`** — after uploading, the uploader confirms the draft
   transaction. Only then does it become visible to approvers.
2. **Approver → `APPROVE` or `REJECT`** — an authorized approver acts on the
   confirmed transaction. Comments are **required** for a rejection.

A rejected transaction goes back for correction and re-upload; an approved one is
published to Datalibweb.

::: {.bg-washed-red .pa3 .br2 .ba .b--light-red .f6}
**Note:** A transaction cannot be approved or rejected more than once, and the
action cannot be changed once it goes through.
:::

## Acting on a transaction

::: {.panel-tabset}

## R

```r
library(primus)

# Uploader confirms the draft transaction
primus_confirm("006-000327173-MNARAW-AGO-536ce")

# Approver approves ...
primus_approve("006-000327173-MNARAW-ALB-8ef53")

# ... or rejects (comments required)
primus_reject(
  "007-000327173-MNAPOV-DJI-24674",
  comments = "welfare variable missing labels"
)
```

## Stata

```stata
* Uploader confirms the draft transaction
primus action, tranxid(006-000327173-MNARAW-AGO-536ce) proc(6) ///
    decision(confirm) comments(harmonized file ready)

* Approver approves ...
primus action, tranxid(006-000327173-MNARAW-ALB-8ef53) proc(6) ///
    decision(approve) comments(ok to approve)

* ... or rejects (comments required)
primus action, tranxid(007-000327173-MNAPOV-DJI-24674) proc(7) ///
    decision(reject) comments(welfare variable missing labels)
```

:::

## Tracking status

Query outstanding transactions to see what is pending review.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## R

```r
primus_query_transactions(process_name = "GMD", status = "pending")
```

## Stata

```stata
primus query, process(6) overallstatus(PENDING)
```

:::

## Outcome

Only **approved** harmonized files are published and made available for
distribution from Datalibweb.
